water-cake-teleculinaria.name: Water Cake
instructions: Beat the yolks with the sugar until they gain some volume. Add the water and the lemon zest and stir.
Apart, beat the clears in castle and add them to the previous preparation, alternating with the flour sifted with the yeast.
Put a hole in it with butter and put the dough in it. Take it to the oven, preheated at 175oC, for about 40 minutes or until the toothpick comes dry. Remove, let it cool and peel.

watermelon-pizza.name: Watermelon Pizza
instructions: Arrange watermelon on large plate or cutting board.
Sprinkle with desired toppings.
Cut into wedges to serve.

watermelon-endive-and-fig-salad.name: Watermelon, Endive, And Fig Salad
instructions: Whisk lemon juice, oil, and honey in a small bowl to combine; season with kosher salt and pepper.
Arrange watermelon, endive, figs, and olives on a platter in sections. Drizzle dressing over and sprinkle with sea salt.

white-chocolate-pumpkin-spice-muffins.name: White Chocolate Pumpkin Spice Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line 9 muffin cups with paper liners.
Whisk 1 ½ cups flour, white sugar, brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl until well combined. Set aside.
Combine pumpkin purée, oil, milk, egg, vanilla extract, and lemon extract in a separate large bowl until smooth; stir into flour mixture until batter is just combined.
Toss white chocolate chips and 1 tablespoon flour together in a small bowl until evenly coated; fold into batter. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, 15 to 20 minutes.

white-coffee-ice-cream.name: White Coffee Ice Cream
instructions: Place the bowl of ice cream maker in the freezer.

Combine cream, sugar, and egg yolks in a saucepan; cook and stir over medium-low heat until mixture is heated through but not boiling, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove saucepan from heat and add coffee beans. Transfer cream mixture to a bowl and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Strain coffee beans out of cream mixture. Stir milk, vanilla extract, and salt into cream mixture; transfer to bowl of ice cream maker.
Process cream mixture in the ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions.

ingredients.item: 5-6 big eggs (if small in the tube)

2. Add the eggplant, red pepper and olive oil and mix well.
3. (All potatoes must be lubricated) oily paper cool on the base of a clamped mold with 20 cm diameter.

winter-salad-with-lemon-yogurt-dressing.name: Winter Salad With Lemon-yogurt Dressing

ingredients.item: 1/2-inch cubes peeled kohlrabi or peeled broccoli stems

instructions: Whisk first 5 ingredients in small bowl. Season dressing to taste with sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Toss lettuce and next 8 ingredients in large bowl. Add dressing and toss to coat. Divide salad among plates; sprinkle with sunflower seeds.

winter-simmer-pot.name: Winter Simmer Pot
instructions: Bring 8 cups water to a boil in a large pot over high heat. Add orange peel, apple peel, lemon peel, cinnamon sticks, vanilla, star anise, and pine sprig to the pot.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for as long as desired, up to 8 hours or all day. Check the water level every 30 minutes, adding more water as necessary.

winter-slaw.name: Winter Slaw
instructions: Whisk vinegar, miso, ginger, and oil in small bowl. Combine slaw, green onions, and cilantro in large bowl. Toss with dressing.
